_publications._publicationTitle: FT895 Impairs Mitochondrial Function in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cells.

_contextSnippet: Using the STRING database to analyze the functional protein association networks, we identified SLC2A1, the gene encoding glucose transporter 1 (GLUT1), as the central node in the network
details: Successfully identified SLC2A1 (GLUT1 gene) as the central node in functional protein association networks
